checks.name: pnpm
checks.remediation: Run corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate.

checks.name: docker
checks.remediation: Install Docker Engine or Docker Desktop and ensure docker is on PATH.

checks.name: docker-compose
checks.remediation: Install the Docker Compose v2 plugin.

checks.name: pg_dump
checks.remediation: Install PostgreSQL client tools so pg_dump is available on PATH.

checks.name: pg_restore
checks.remediation: Install PostgreSQL client tools so pg_restore is available on PATH.

checks.name: file:pnpm-lock.yaml
checks.remediation: Restore the required repository file pnpm-lock.yaml.

checks.name: file:pnpm-workspace.yaml
checks.remediation: Restore the required repository file pnpm-workspace.yaml.

checks.name: file:docker-compose.yml
checks.remediation: Restore the required repository file docker-compose.yml.

checks.name: file:scripts/prove-mvp-runtime.mjs
checks.remediation: Restore the required repository file scripts/prove-mvp-runtime.mjs.

checks.name: file:scripts/runtime-smoke.mjs
checks.remediation: Restore the required repository file scripts/runtime-smoke.mjs.

checks.name: file:scripts/backup-db.sh
checks.remediation: Restore the required repository file scripts/backup-db.sh.

checks.name: file:scripts/restore-db.sh
checks.remediation: Restore the required repository file scripts/restore-db.sh.

checks.name: environment-file
checks.remediation: Copy .env.example to .env and replace all placeholders.

checks.name: DATABASE_URL
checks.remediation: Set DATABASE_URL to a PostgreSQL connection string.

checks.name: AUTH_SECRET
checks.remediation: Generate a strong AUTH_SECRET, for example with openssl rand -base64 48.

checks.name: application-origin
checks.remediation: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL or APP_ORIGIN to a valid HTTP(S) origin.

checks.name: restore-database-url
checks.remediation: Set MVP_RESTORE_DATABASE_URL to a disposable PostgreSQL database to prove restore behavior.
